name: Dirty Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped onion (about 1/2 of a medium onion)
1/2 of a medium bell pepper, chopped
Salt, ground black pepper, Tabasco or other Louisiana hot sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the rice and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, partially brown the ground beef over medium heat. Pour off excess fat.
3. Add thyme and chopped vegetables to the skillet. Continue cooking until onions are transparent.
4. Season with salt, black pepper, and Tabasco sauce. Stir in the cooked rice.
5. Adjust seasonings as needed and cook for a few more minutes over low heat.
6. If the dish seems dry during cooking, add water or broth to keep it moist.
End of Recipe
